model.description: Model to use: 'original' (works without voice ref), 'turbo' (fastest, requires voice ref, supports [laugh] tags), or 'multilingual' (23+ languages)

mode.description: Mode of operation: 'tts' (Text-to-Speech) or 'vc' (Voice Conversion, original model only)

text.description: Text to convert to speech. Turbo model supports tags like [laugh], [cough], [chuckle]
text.title: Text

voice_reference.description: Reference audio file for voice cloning. Required for turbo model.
voice_reference.title: Voice Reference

language.description: Language code for multilingual model (ar, da, de, el, en, es, fi, fr, he, hi, it, ja, ko, ms, nl, no, pl, pt, ru, sv, sw, tr, zh)
language.title: Language

source_audio.description: Source audio for voice conversion (VC mode with original model only)
source_audio.title: Source Audio

target_voice_style.description: Target voice style for voice conversion (VC mode with original model only)
target_voice_style.title: Target Voice Style

exaggeration.description: Expressiveness control (original/multilingual). Higher (0.7+) = dramatic, lower (0.3-) = neutral
exaggeration.title: Exaggeration

cfg_weight.description: Voice matching strength (original/multilingual). Lower (0.3) = natural variation, higher (0.7+) = closer match
cfg_weight.title: Cfg Weight
